languages.text: "Вы нарушили священные догмы. Этого достаточно, чтобы вынести приговор".

traits.locale_text: а с хрена ль он еретический

languages.text: "You have violated sacred dogma. That is enough for me to deliver your sentence."
languages.original_text: "Вы нарушили священные догмы. Этого достаточно, чтобы вынести приговор".

traits.locale_text: "You have violated sacred dogma. That is enough for me to deliver your sentence."
"You have violated sacred dogma. That is enough for me to deliver your sentence."
"You have violated sacred dogma. That is enough for me to deliver your sentence."

languages.text: 「聖なる教義を破った。この罪で君を裁く」
languages.original_text: "You have violated sacred dogma. That is enough for me to deliver your sentence."

traits.locale_text: 「聖なる教義を破った。この罪で君を裁く」

languages.text: «Ha violado el dogma sagrado. Es razón suficiente para ejecutar su sentencia».
languages.original_text: "You have violated sacred dogma. That is enough for me to deliver your sentence."

traits.locale_text: «Ha violado el dogma sagrado. Es razón suficiente para ejecutar su sentencia».

languages.text: “你亵渎了神圣教条。仅此一点，就足够我对你宣判了。”
languages.original_text: "You have violated sacred dogma. That is enough for me to deliver your sentence."

traits.locale_text: “你亵渎了神圣教条。仅此一点，就足够我对你宣判了。”

languages.text: "Ihr habt ein heiliges Dogma verletzt. Das reicht mir, um Euer Urteil zu vollstrecken."
languages.original_text: "You have violated sacred dogma. That is enough for me to deliver your sentence."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr habt ein heiliges Dogma verletzt. Das reicht mir, um Euer Urteil zu vollstrecken."

languages.text: "Kutsal dogmayı ihlal ettiniz. Cezalandırılmanız için yeter de artar."
languages.original_text: "You have violated sacred dogma. That is enough for me to deliver your sentence."

traits.locale_text: "Kutsal dogmayı ihlal ettiniz. Cezalandırılmanız için yeter de artar."

languages.text: « Vous avez enfreint le dogme sacré. C'est une raison suffisante pour prononcer votre sentence. »
languages.original_text: "You have violated sacred dogma. That is enough for me to deliver your sentence."

traits.locale_text: « Vous avez enfreint le dogme sacré. C'est une raison suffisante pour prononcer votre sentence. »
